About.heading: We are a team of passionate developers dedicated to delivering high-quality software.
About.description: At Codiksa, we believe that technology should empower businesses. Our approach combines technical excellence with a deep understanding of user needs to create products that scale.

milestones.m1_desc: Codiksa was founded by 3 developers with a vision to build better products.
milestones.m2_desc: Grew to 10+ employees and delivered our 50th project.
milestones.m3_desc: Started working with international clients across Europe and the US.
milestones.m4_desc: Launched our dedicated AI & Cloud solutions department.
